textPlain: Various species of bass make highly visible nests.  A friend spent his masters snorkeling Florida lakes, doing population surveys while dodging gators.  Last I heard there has been significant progress using drones, marine EVs, and CV to speed up the process.  From a research point of view it's amazing because a single aerial photo on a clear day can give you a lot of data.https://forums.pondboss.com/ubbthreads.php?ubb=download&Numb...
